title: Exosphere 2 Modrinth Edition
description: Explore the unique sky islands of Exosphere! Official Modrinth port of the original pack.
body:
[![](https://i.imgur.com/UaKlBzG.jpeg)](https://beyondmines.net/)

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1134586975286997083?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=433976&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/2Hau3bGx4u)


**Beyond Mines: Exosphere Modrinth Edition** is the official Modrinth port of the second-generation sky island pack for Minecraft 1.21.1 on NeoForge. Build in the clouds, explore floating islands, and parkour between ruined structures using enhanced movement options. The overworld is shattered; the sky is yours to conquer.

Choose a starter kit with unique movement gadgets and survive with a curated set of mods. Complete quests to earn rewards that unlock new items and be guided through modded content.

![](https://i.imgur.com/AllMwxW.jpeg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/BvjCiM0.jpeg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/mUhQk6f.jpeg)

Beyond Mines modpacks include [E4MC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/e4mc) for quick coop games, or any form of small multiplayer with friends, not only locally. [Read more](https://beyondmines.net/play-together#em4c)

![](https://i.imgur.com/VY2PiMA.jpeg)

This pack contains complementary shaders and if there are any issues with them it falls on this modpack and not complementary. If you want to learn more about Complementary, check them out at: [complementary.dev](https://www.complementary.dev/)

[![](https://i.imgur.com/kKouECa.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/beyondmines)
